scripts.name: adl-backup.sh
scripts.description: adl-backup.sh — back up an installed Linux distribution to an archive.

scripts.name: adl-configure-audio.sh
scripts.description: adl-configure-audio.sh — start PulseAudio forwarding for the Linux desktop.

scripts.name: adl-create-launcher.sh
scripts.description: adl-create-launcher.sh — generate a one-command desktop launcher.

scripts.name: adl-create-user.sh
scripts.description: adl-create-user.sh — create a normal (non-root) Linux user inside the distro.

scripts.name: adl-device-report.sh
scripts.description: adl-device-report.sh — collect non-sensitive device facts for the ADL wizard.

scripts.name: adl-doctor.sh
scripts.description: adl-doctor.sh — diagnose an ADL installation. Diagnoses only; changes nothing.

scripts.name: adl-install-base.sh
scripts.description: adl-install-base.sh — install the Termux-side base packages for ADL.

scripts.name: adl-install-desktop.sh
scripts.description: adl-install-desktop.sh — install a desktop environment inside the distro.

scripts.name: adl-install-distro.sh
scripts.description: adl-install-distro.sh — install a Linux distribution with proot-distro.

scripts.name: adl-preflight.sh
scripts.description: adl-preflight.sh — check that this device is ready for an ADL installation.

scripts.name: adl-remove-installation.sh
scripts.description: adl-remove-installation.sh — remove ADL-managed pieces, with confirmation.
